summary: Lead accepts M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 after test_engineer REVIEW, independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT, and lead validation of the handoffs and task state. The task is evidence-only: no product, runtime, content, tooling, docs, telemetry, server, multiplayer, release/commercial, protocol, save-schema, Electron IPC, or architecture scope changed. The recorded evidence covers Web playable responsiveness, Node multi-year duration/RSS, deterministic simulation, save/load timing, client-core session export/import timing, Web build, desktop security/package smoke, Chromium e2e, and repository-wide checks. The current desktop import/export caveat is accepted because no desktop file import/export bridge exists in this slice; future bridge work must measure that boundary separately.

tests_run.result: VALID task file before lead acceptance update.
No whitespace errors before lead acceptance.

tests_run.command: QA reruns: pnpm check, pnpm test, pnpm sim:determinism, pnpm sim:perf-baseline, pnpm build:web, pnpm desktop:security-check, pnpm desktop:package, pnpm test:e2e, M5 multi-year runner, timing probes, taskctl validate/list/ready
tests_run.result: Independent QA recorded all material gates passing and recommended PASS.

decisions: Accept M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 for PR/CI/main integration; do not mark CLOSED until PR CI passes, the branch enters main, and local main is synchronized.

Accept PASS rather than PASS_WITH_LIMITS for this task because the import/export caveat matches the implemented current surface: client-core session JSON and UI save/load are measurable, while desktop file import/export IPC does not exist yet.
Keep the stale required_tests alias pnpm e2e visible as a task wording issue; the repository actual script pnpm test:e2e passed in writer and QA evidence.
Preserve M5 formal passage and manual node battle as Human Gates; this performance task does not pass M5 and does not decide manual battle.

risks.risk: Future desktop file import/export work must add platform bridge timing once a file bridge exists.
Task required_tests says pnpm e2e while actual repo script is pnpm test:e2e; evidence used the real script.

requested_action: Commit lead acceptance, push branch, open PR, wait for CI, merge into main, then close M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 and continue to the next dependency-ready M5 task.
